hero.title: We are Isella Group
hero.subtitle: Developing innovative business projects in international markets

about.title: Who We Are
about.description: What started as a bold idea in 2020 has grown into a group of companies that {bold1}. From our own production facility in Germany to sales operations across Europe, we turn raw materials into {bold2} and ideas into {bold3}. Every project we take on starts with one question: how can we do this better?
about.descriptionPlain: What started as a bold idea in 2020 has grown into a group of companies that builds homes, brands, and futures. From our own production facility in Germany to sales operations across Europe, we turn raw materials into living spaces and ideas into thriving businesses. Every project we take on starts with one question: how can we do this better?
about.highlight: Modular houses, tiny houses, and sustainable brands — built by a team that thinks globally.

teamwork.description: Behind every house we build and every brand we launch, there are {bold} — drawing blueprints at midnight, testing materials by hand, closing deals in three languages. We're based in Germany and Poland, but our mindset has no borders. Different backgrounds, one mission.
teamwork.descriptionPlain: Behind every house we build and every brand we launch, there are real people — drawing blueprints at midnight, testing materials by hand, closing deals in three languages. We're based in Germany and Poland, but our mindset has no borders. Different backgrounds, one mission.

innovation.description: In our production hall in Kierspe, raw timber becomes someone's future home. Berghaus — our flagship — designs, builds, and delivers modular houses and tiny houses that prove sustainable living doesn't mean compromise. Every unit is configured to order, crafted by hand, and delivered across Europe.
innovation.closing: We don't outsource quality. We own every step — from the first cut to the front door key.

contactSection.heading: It's all about what we can do together.
contactSection.subheading: Follow our social media to stay updated.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We adapt to new market trends and develop cutting-edge solutions.

teamwork.title: Teamwork
teamwork.description: Our multicultural team brings diverse perspectives to every project.

experience.title: Experience

creativity.title: Creativity

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Project?

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Our Story
about.story: Isella Group was established in 2020 by Dennis Czekalla. We focus on developing innovative business ventures, starting with our flagship project Berghaus — Tiny House & Modular Homes. Since then, we have rapidly expanded, building our own production facility in Kierspe, Germany, and establishing sales operations across Europe.

team.title: Our Team
team.description: Our workforce comprises ambitious, creative professionals characterized by significant cultural and linguistic diversity. Team members bring varied expertise across multiple disciplines, including marketing, sales, project management, administrative roles, architecture, and construction.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: We are committed to creating sustainable living solutions and building brands that make a difference — powered by an international team and a hands-on approach to business.

berghaus.title: Berghaus — Tiny House & Modular Homes
berghaus.description: Our flagship project: modular houses and tiny houses built from high-quality natural materials in our own production facility in Kierspe, Germany. Customizable to individual specifications and manufactured in-house since 2022.

tri2thrive.title: Tri2Thrive
tri2thrive.description: Sports and endurance brand promoting an active, healthy lifestyle through triathlon and outdoor activities.

becz.title: BECZ
becz.description: Business consulting and entrepreneurship — helping companies grow and expand internationally.

denniscz.title: dennis.cz
denniscz.description: Personal brand of CEO Dennis Czekalla — speaker, entrepreneur, and endurance athlete.

production.title: Production Facility
production.description: Our houses are manufactured at our production site in Kierspe, Germany.

career.title: Career
career.subtitle: Join Isella Group!
career.description: We are a young, rapidly growing company made up of creative and ambitious people. We are looking for candidates for both office and construction positions.
career.cta: We are open to new people who, with their interesting ideas and commitment, will contribute to the success of our projects.

positions.title: Open Positions
positions.description: Interested? Send your application to info@isella-group.com

production.title: Production Worker
production.description: Join our production team building modular houses and tiny houses. Experience in woodworking or construction is a plus.

sales.title: Sales Manager
sales.description: Drive growth by connecting customers with our sustainable housing solutions. International experience preferred.

architect.title: Architect / Designer
architect.description: Design innovative modular and tiny house concepts. CAD proficiency and passion for sustainable architecture required.

marketing.title: Marketing Specialist
marketing.description: Create compelling content and campaigns for our brands. Social media and digital marketing experience essential.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Happy to answer all your questions
contact.description: Don't miss the opportunity, contact Isella Group. We will listen to your needs and formulate the appropriate offer.
contact.emailDescription: Send us a message and we'll get back to you promptly.
